title: Israel discovers 2,600-yr-old cargo of raw iron in ancient Mediterranean shipwreck
Ancient artifact found in town depicts Rome's most hated and tyrannical emperor
description: The rare copper coin, discovered in Northwich, dates from between the years 50AD and 70AD, and displays the face of the infamous Nero Augustus.

title: ‘You won’t be able to AI your way through an oral exam’: Colleges have an Ancient Greek-style solution to the Gen Z stare
description: “It comes across as if we’re trying to prevent cheating,” the University of Pennsylvania's Emily Hammer says. “That’s not why we’re doing this."

title: Why Ancient Rituals Start with Gayatri Mantra for Babies | Ft. Acharya Pratishtha
description: Why are the first words spoken to a newborn considered so powerful in our ancient traditions? In this insightful episode, Acharya Pratishtha explains the deep spiritual significance of chanting the Gayatri Mantra to babies. Rooted in Vedic wisdom, this sacred mantra is believed to purify the mind, awaken consciousness, and invite divine protection from the very beginning of life. Discover how sound vibrations influence a child’s energy, sankar , and future growth, and why sages emphasized starting life with positivity and divine frequencies. This episode uncovers the science and spirituality behind this powerful ritual on Times Mantra

title: Germany Allocates $9.28B Climate Plan to Close 2030 Emissions Gap, Cut Fossil Fuel Dependence
description: Germany has launched an €8 billion ($9.28 billion) climate programme to accelerate emissions reductions and reduce reliance on fossil fuel imports, as policymakers confront rising energy insecurity and a widening...
